reviews.review_description: Very good game play. Random cards. A million chip start with a 7-Day free membership. Can't go wrong.
I registered but could never log in because they never send the verification code. I waited for over an hour. Horrible!!

After being addicted to vagas infinite for a long time because I love poker and the chance to meet people, was a high roller for a while and loved it but the algorithm and the amount of set up hands you get and bad beats! And don't get me started on the kids!! I have found you Pokeroo and I love it people all friendly and adults! It simulated a real poker game in my opinion where the cards delt to you are as if your playing with people not a generated machine. I miss pass through whilst playing but thats easy overlooked due to nature of its game play. Im a massive fan and can't see myself going to the dark side again.

This is a refreshing new Texas Poker game which plays cross platform.The graphics and environments are amazing and as good as ive seen anywhere. I know testers have been testing and playing Pokeroo for months fine tuning the game play. I believe the intro when it says a game created by players for players. There is a team of Admins,moderators and Ambassadors that help in game with controls etc.. I find this game plays as close to real life poker than any other as we are not given hand strength or what hand we actually have.Players have to think for themselves and create their own strategy. 
  For anyone trying this game for the 1st time rest assured I believe there will be how to navigate video to learn the controls , however real gamers will pick this up super quick.
So far the players are all really friendly and sociable and the endless tables mean I'm never short of a place to play with 6 different environments each with 6 table levels on them. Well done to the devs and the entire Pokeroo team for giving us players what we asked for, we can see that this game is progressive and that it will get even better as time goes on xx

If you’ve played the other online poker games it may take you a bit but you do begin to see the set up hands, repeat cards …. on and on. Not random like real life at all. 
With this game the cards feel as random as though you were dealing from a deck. 
The people are GREAT!! No rude kids playing bingo . Very friendly and welcoming. 
The graphics are very nice and I’m told multi table tournies are on the way!! 
It’s brand new still in beta but a lot of fun with big things on the way! (So I’m told😀) 
Mama.K.61
Played all other games, this by far is superior. Graphics are great, speed of game is perfect,,and the players are super nice. This is definitely the place to be
This game hands down has the best visuals going so professional  and always there to answer your questions I'm in for the long haul

I gave this game 5 Stars because it's a great game. I love the whole point of the game. But there's not enough players that play on It yet. So for me, it's too early to keep coming over and playing all my friends that plan other poker sites. Won't even give it a shot because there's not enough people. Other than the administrators. So when more players play consistently, that's what I will be a consistent player. Great game. Great concept just too early.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5 stars & for believing in us! You are right, we are intentionally growing slowly to ensure the perfect experience before the big marketing push. In the meantime, we'd love to see you in our Facebook group & Discord! There is always a fun game or challenge running there with our community. Come join the fun! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description:
everything from the people to the tables atmosphere
i was lost first time in vr everyone was awesome so helpful maybe one day we can really cash out lol

developer_response.body: Thank you! We love hearing that our community was there to help you when you felt lost in VR—that’s exactly the welcoming atmosphere we strive for. As for cashing out, while the chips are virtual, the fun is 100% real! 😉 See you at the tables! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: God look more random than other poker games.

reviews.review_title: Excellent Poker w/ Great People Who Care
reviews.review_description: Such fun traveling with all of you! An exceptional online poker game that has amazing views, feel, game play and best of all, the people that play! To all my new friends!  Thank You! :)

developer_response.body: Thank you! The travel theme is great, but you nailed it—it's the people that make the difference. We're so glad you made new friends. Welcome to the community! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description:
Pokeroo is hands down an incredible gaming platform! First off, let me give props to the admin and moderators—they are super helpful and make navigating through the game smooth and easy. The environments in this game are absolutely stunning, with graphics that really pull you in. The poker gameplay itself? Pure genius—fun, creative, and just overall amazing.

I can’t give this just 5 stars… this one deserves a 10/10. By far the best out there—and that’s a Flatdog fact! Much love ❤️💯🌭🍔

Pokeroo is hands down the most exciting and immersive VR poker game I’ve played! From the moment you sit at the  virtual table, you feel like you are in a real poker room surrounded by players from around the globe

The graphics are stunning, the gameplay is smooth, and best of all the community is absolutely amazing.   It’s not just a game but an experience filled with laughter, strategy, and friendships.

Whether you are a beginner or a seasoned poker player, Pokeroo makes you feel welcome and keeps you coming back for more. I’ve met incredible people and have made unforgettable memories here.  Friendships for a lifetime!

If you love poker and want a fun global, and interactive way to play, Pokeroo is the place to be!

developer_response.body: Wow, what a review! "Friendships for a lifetime" is beautiful. We built Pokeroo to be a global experience where you can connect, laugh, and find immersive fun. Thank you for this amazing support! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description:
From the start admin and mods where very friendly and took me aside to show me the game and how to use the table. Players are friendly and welcoming. The graphics of the rooms are amazing on how they all differ as you go to different countries. Will definitely recommend for people to join the discord and come and check out the game.

COME JOIN IN ON THE FUN AND LAUGHS!!!!

I absolutely love this poker game! It’s truly international, which means I can connect and play with people from all around the world. The social side and the community are amazing – it feels like sitting at a real table with friends. The gameplay is smooth and realistic, just like playing with real cards. It’s the perfect mix of fun, competition, and connection. Highly recommend!

A terrific addition to the Meta universe. This is a poker game that was created by poker players with wit and beauty. 

As with any game there is a small learning curve to get used to the mechanics but the game itself is true to real poker. An already loyal player base is there, friendly and ready to help new players! 

So download and enjoy!

A great game with even better people. From players for players... that seems to be the program. Poker without a lot of unnecessary extras and a great team that's always trying to help. The table setting is also beautifully designed. So grab your boarding pass and fly around the world 💜

developer_response.body: You nailed our motto! We are players building this for players. So glad you're enjoying the travel theme and the design. Grab that boarding pass and let's fly! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_title: True poker with truly great people
reviews.review_description: This game is a refreshing change to all the other Poker games out there. Realistic poker and a great community that is growing all the time. A great bunch of moderators and admin within the game, too, gives it a great one big family feel. Keep up the good work

developer_response.body: "One big family"—we love that! We're extremely proud of our moderators and the growing community. Thanks for helping us build a welcoming place to play! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: This is a really nice poker game!! It's awesome they have moderators that are there to guide you through the controls and tell you all about the game. Hands down best poker app Ive played on my VR! It's on a soft launch so there is tons more content coming and I can't wait!! Way to go PokerRoo Global!!! 👍👍👍💯💯💯💯😎😎

developer_response.body: Thank you! You're right, this is just the beginning (Soft Launch). We have so much more content coming for our players. Glad the mods helped guide you! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: If you’re a poker enthusiast looking to elevate your game to the next level, Pokeroo on the Meta Quest is an absolute must try! This immersive VR poker game brings the classic card game to life with stunning realism. The virtual tables feel just like the real thing, and the community is fantastic. You’ll find yourself playing with some truly skilled and friendly players. The environments are breathtaking, offering a variety of settings that you can explore as you play. Whether you’re a seasoned pro or a beginner, Pokeroo offers an engaging and social experience that’s hard to beat!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
“I had such a great time playing the poker-sized Pokeroo! It’s not just about the game itself—it created a really social and friendly atmosphere where I met a lot of new friends. The setting and scenery made the experience even more enjoyable, and it’s something I’d definitely recommend to anyone looking for a fun, welcoming activity. I’ll definitely be back for more!”

developer_response.body: Making new friends is what Pokeroo is all about! We're so happy you enjoyed the social atmosphere and the scenery. Can't wait to see you back for more! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_title: Pokeroo is a refreshing new Poker game.
reviews.review_description: It turns every hand into both an adventure and a social experience. Instead of just sitting at a virtual table, you “travel” the world—checking in at airports, choosing destinations, and playing at tables themed after real countries—while your passport logs achievements as you climb the ranks. The gameplay feels smooth and immersive, but what really makes it shine is the community: players are genuinely welcoming, quick to chat, and create the vibe of a global poker lounge rather than a faceless grind. With cross‑platform play across VR, mobile, and PC, Pokeroo makes it easy to jump in anywhere and always find a friendly table. It’s poker reimagined as a shared journey, and the community spirit is what makes it unforgettable.

developer_response.body: This is a perfect description of Pokeroo! We love that you're enjoying the travel adventure and the cross-platform play. The community spirit is definitely what makes it shine. See you at the tables! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: Literally!!!   Play in a different state, country, continent every day if you like! Great graphics and audio. The traditional music from different lands are great! A welcoming and warm community an excellent investment of your ..Time.. which is precious to all of us. If there was stock in this particular site I would buy in.

The community is what makes this game, there seems to be a lot (perhaps several hundred) of really nice people who love to play poker and the Pokeroo folks have done a great job creating beautiful environments to play poker in.

My only concern is growth. It takes a lot of players to make a truly great app and most people won’t stick with an app if their first impression aren’t great. 

My first impressions were very mixed. I’ve been in VR since spring of 2016 and I’m very good at intuiting user interfaces. In this game I had to ask a lot of questions so the UI isn’t that intuitive. Once someone explains it to you once, or twice, it gets easier. Fortunately, the community is friendly and ready to help.

I’m going to give it several more tries. Hopefully I don’t run into too many legacy millionaires who love to go all in and accidentally bankrupt one before they get a chance to build a proper bankroll.

developer_response.body:
Hello Robear777,  and thank you for the thoughtful review. We're thrilled that you've enjoyed the community and the environments we've built—that's exactly the experience we want to create.

We hear your feedback about the learning curve you experienced with the user interface. As a game created "by players, for players," we've intentionally designed Pokeroo with a high degree of complexity and a wide array of practical functionalities to cater to many different needs. This depth can certainly feel like a challenge at first, but as you've started to discover, it becomes an incredibly smooth and powerful experience once you learn the ropes.

To help you master those ropes, we created a complete tutorial video. Currently, you can find it on our website, Pokeroo Global (in the Pokeroo TV section), and on YouTube by searching 'Pokeroo Tutorial'. And to make this even easier for new players in the future, we're happy to share that a tutorial will soon pop up automatically in-game the first time a user joins.

For a more personal touch, we also have a very capable team of ambassadors and moderators—our induct-ins—who strive to maintain a constant presence in-game and are ready to personally walk you through all the functionalities and help with anything you might need.

You’ve joined us at a really wonderful time. We are focused on growing our community organically, to make sure we preserve the same friendly and welcoming atmosphere that you've praised. While our next big goal is to have tables active around the clock, our top priority will always be the quality of our community. We believe in building it together, and we're so glad to have players like you as a part of it.

- The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_title: I've found my poker home and family!
reviews.review_description: This is a one of a kind poker gaming experience! To have legs and be able to walk around, hug someone and see the sights is amazing. All if the continents and countries are spot on with the scenery. Everyone is so nice, helpful and professional. This POKEROO is my home.

After playing other pantomime poker games for a few years, this one is much more realistic poker. Everyone in the game is super friendly too especially the mods. 
Great work guys lets hope it stays like this and you will be onto a winner

developer_response.body: We really appreciate that comparison. We aim for realistic poker without the "pantomime." The friendliness comes from our amazing community—thanks for being part of it! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description:
I have installed and played this New poker game. What a fantastic app and game.
Well thought out with different worldwide countries and continents.
Beautiful scenery and well designed graphics. 
This is a must have app for all poker players.

Pokeroo delivers the best Texas Hold’em experience on VR, mobile, and PC. 

Play in stunning locations like Brazil, South Africa, France, Nigeria, and across the USA—including New York and California.

Highlights:

Gorgeous international views

Smooth, competitive gameplay

Cross-platform excellence

Friendly, active community


Kudos to the dev team for creating a polished, world-class poker platform.

developer_response.body: Thank you for highlighting our global vision! Whether you're in France  or NY, on VR or Mobile, we want the experience to be smooth and social. Kudos accepted! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: This is as close to real poker I’ve ever seen on line.. the minute I hit my first room there was a mediator there to help… all the folks I have played with are really cool.. thanks to the folks that made this game…acesnammo

developer_response.body: That’s exactly what we aim for: real poker with real help. We want every player to feel supported from the minute they join. Welcome to the community, acesnammo! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description:
I tried this game today. As a long time (45 years) Poker player and experience with many Online Poker apps, THIS one clearly is NOT ready for launch.
The graphics are not the best, but the biggest problem is understanding how it works, from the start.

The developers might have used several years developing this (as Brandon the guy helping out in the game, told me), but when the Players struggle with understanding the basics of the game.. they are on the wrong path.
There are already infinete Vegas, Poker VR and soon Poker added to Billionaires Casino.

Then THIS falls short on standing ANY chanse of making an impact.
Maybe the developers felt presured to release it for economical reasons, but doing it like this, js a recipe for failure.
Low level graphics, confusing layout, and no genuine reason to choose THIS to play Poker.

When I asked why they did not follow the normal layout of putting the card on the table when say...2 players are All In preflop (the flop...then the turn after a few seconds..then the River, the same way) I was told..we put out the cards one by one.

That tells me they do not understand how WE the players want a Poker game to work.
They are programers and developers. NOT passionate  Poker players.

So they MUST change their attitude, understanding, and  approach to what they are doing. Or thry will FAIL.

developer_response.body:
Hello Tor_McCool,

Thank you for taking the time to try Pokeroo and for writing such a detailed review. We sincerely appreciate feedback from experienced poker players like yourself.

We hear your comments on the graphics and layout. This game is the result of many years of development and more than a year of testing with our dedicated founding community, so we're certainly not done polishing. Our top priority for launch was to ensure smooth, stable performance on the Quest platform, and we are continuously working on visual enhancements. To directly address the issues of a confusing layout and helping new players learn the ropes, we will soon be implementing a video tutorial that will pop up the first time a player joins. We appreciate you highlighting this need.

You've highlighted one of the key design choices we made with our dealing procedure. In Pokeroo, we chose to present each community card individually to build the maximum suspense and drama for every stage of the hand in a VR environment. We wanted players to feel the thrill of every single card reveal. While this presentation differs from the grouped flop seen in some other formats, we aimed for a more cinematic and engaging experience. We appreciate your perspective on this and are always listening to our community.

Our core mission is to live up to our slogan, "a game created by players for players," and passionate feedback like yours is exactly what helps us achieve that. To that end, we would like to personally invite you to join our team in-game for a few hands. We are always at the tables, and we are all ears, waiting to hear your perspective on how we can make Pokeroo even better.

Thank you again,

The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: Awesome game. Continents with countries. Lots of room at the tables. Graphic scenery. You can move around the rooms. You can wear the outfit you choose for your avatar. Cards are easy to see  Yahoo Pokeroo !

A new Poker game with a bunch of friendly people. Lots of banter and are helpful .
Great animations with beautful scenery.
A relaxing place to have a great game of poker
Real good game moderators and ambassadors really helpful near you'll get to real poker no stupid flops or rivers if you like real poker you will love this game

developer_response.body: Exactly! We focus on real poker math—no crazy, rigged flops here. Just a fair game with helpful people. Thanks for noticing the difference! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: This game was created by poker players, bringing an authentic feel during hands that are played. As a newer game on the platform I'm excited to see what future updates bring. The community is already fantastic.

developer_response.body: You felt it! We are poker players ourselves, so that authentic feel is essential. Stay tuned—lots of awesome updates coming for the community! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: This game is fun relaxing an the people you meet are all chill good conversations an even better poker cant wait to see what it becomes in the future 👍👍

developer_response.body: "Chill and real" is exactly the vibe we want! We believe poker should be relaxing and social. We have big plans for the future, so stick around! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_title: Best place to meet an amazing community
reviews.review_description: Amazing place where you are not only met by beautiful graphics but also a great community, even for a beginner you really feel welcome
Best poker game no bull&#*^ algorithms, very fun community and everybody is helpful. Try it you'll like the vibe.
Doing a great job with this new poker , im loving it, and they are not done yet 😀 👍

developer_response.body: That personal touch is key for us. We're glad the mods took the time to welcome you! The travel theme is just starting—hope to see you in the Discord and the game! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: I love this new poker game, so much more 🤔🤔🤔 just poker. lol looking forward to growing with the game

developer_response.body: Elvis has left the building... and entered Pokeroo! Love the energy. We are excited to keep growing this community with you! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: Poker played in a relaxed atmosphere among friendly people. from all over the world.
Pokeroo global is an amazing poker site, better than all the rest
Great game for people who want to play real poker with great pokers
This is such a fun game i have tried other poker vr games but this one beets them all

Best experience ever 🙌
Stunning graphics, incredible community—everything about this is just amazing. Truly the greatest!

developer_response.body: "Incredible community"—we couldn't agree more! They make the stunning graphics come to life. Thanks for the high praise! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: Fantastic game created by some great guys with a great growing community
Great poker community. The moderators are very helpful in giving a tutorial on the ins and outs of the game.

developer_response.body: Glad our team could help show you the ropes! A strong community starts with helping new players feel at home. Thanks for the 5 stars! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: Great game and you can tell that the game is made for players by players
Great community, very friendly, competitive poker. Lots of fun!
Wonderful community of players!
“Best poker game out there! Amazing graphics, fun atmosphere, and a super friendly community. Can’t beat it.”

developer_response.body: Short and sweet—thank you! We agree, you can't beat a friendly community and a fun atmosphere. See you at the tables! - The Pokeroo Team

reviews.review_description: Great game. Very helpful support staff
I really liked the game moderators teach you every part of the game and helps a lot a big thanks to Moderator CanadaWest

developer_response.body: Thank you! We will definitely pass your thanks to Moderator CanadaWest—they are awesome! We want every player to feel supported and learn the game. - The Pokeroo Team
